instruction: Complete this referral chain without using messages: 1) Schedule one cardiology appointment in the next available slot with reason exactly "Echocardiogram", 2) Confirm that an approved referral exists and that its prior-authorization status is approved, 3) Use that approved referral to schedule one specialist appointment in the next available slot with reason exactly "Referral consultation". Book the echocardiogram before the referral consultation. Do not cancel any existing appointments and do not send any messages.
